# gotrippin

> gotrippin is a route-first trip planner. Plan trips together without the chaos — build your route, invite others, and let AI suggest the rest. Ditch messy spreadsheets and endless group chats.

## Description

gotrippin helps travelers create and share trip itineraries. Key features: interactive route maps with drag-to-reorder stops, AI trip assistant for local recommendations, and shareable trips so friends can view and edit the same itinerary.

## Links

- [Home](https://gotrippin.app/home): Landing page and product overview
- [Sign up / Log in](https://gotrippin.app/auth): Create account or sign in
- [Explore](https://gotrippin.app/explore): Browse and discover

## Contact

- [GitHub](https://github.com/dimitarpst/gotrippin)

## Optional

- Product: Web app for travel planning and itinerary management
- Target users: Travelers, groups planning trips together
- Tech: Next.js, Supabase, Mapbox
